products.name: Chocolate Berry Cheesecake
products.description: A decadent cheesecake built on a deep, crumbly dark chocolate crust and crowned with a lavish arrangement of plump fresh strawberries and blueberries dusted in powdered sugar. The contrast between the intense cocoa base and the bright, juicy berries makes this as breathtaking to look at as it is to taste.

products.name: Frosted Carrot Cake
products.description: Warmly spiced, incredibly moist carrot cake blanketed in wave-piped cream cheese frosting — rich, tangy, and impossibly smooth. Adorned with plump blueberries, toasted walnut crumbles, jewel-like dried cranberries, and fresh rosemary sprigs for a finish that is both rustic and beautifully refined.

products.name: Red Velvet Berry Celebration Cake
products.description: Silky cream cheese frosting is edged with a crown of delicate piped rosettes and a vivid red velvet crumb centre. Fresh strawberries, plump blueberries, and golden physalis berries create a dramatic jewel-toned topping, while the rich, velvety cocoa layers beneath make every single slice utterly unforgettable.

products.name: Classic Strawberry Cheesecake
products.description: A luxuriously smooth cream cheese filling nestled on a buttery golden crust, blanketed edge to edge with a generous, glistening layer of freshly sliced strawberries in a sweet glaze. Clean, elegant, and utterly satisfying — the definitive strawberry cheesecake for those who appreciate quality over complexity.

products.name: Gold-Crowned Chocolate Berry Cake
products.description: An intensely rich chocolate cake enveloped in deeply dark, velvety chocolate buttercream, each swirl hand-piped with lush precision. Crowned with gold-leafed strawberries, fresh blueberries, and fragrant mint — a luxurious combination of deep cocoa, fresh fruit, and edible gold that genuinely stops the room.

products.name: Strawberry Crown Cream Cake
products.description: Ethereally light cake coated in clouds of smooth whipped cream, with an elegant piped border framing a glorious centrepiece of tightly arranged fresh strawberries kissed with delicate gold leaf. The contrast of pristine ivory frosting against vibrant scarlet berries is pure, effortless visual poetry.

products.name: Coconut Berry Celebration Cake
products.description: A delicate coconut-infused cake adorned with piped cream rosettes, fresh strawberries, blueberries, and shimmering gold leaf flakes, elegantly finished with a personalised ribbon and custom name board. Every element is thoughtfully crafted to make your celebration feel genuinely one-of-a-kind — custom lettering and ribbons available upon request.

products.name: Rustic Carrot Cream Cake
products.description: A beautifully unpretentious carrot cake with an exposed golden edge and a billowing topping of hand-piped cream cheese frosting waves. Scattered with fresh blueberries, toasted walnuts, dried cranberries, and delicate rosemary — warmly rustic, elegantly garnished, and deeply delicious from first bite to last.

products.name: Artisan Mini Fruit Cakes — Box of 6
products.description: Charming individual cakes topped with hand-piped cream rosettes, fresh blueberries, a vibrant yellow blossom, and toasted nuts — each one a tiny, thoughtfully crafted masterpiece. Baked from a tender spiced base and boxed beautifully, they make a stunning dessert table addition or a heartfelt gift for someone very special.

products.name: Coconut Buttercream Garden Sheet Cake
products.description: An extraordinary large-format celebration cake bordered by an immaculate garden of sage green and ivory buttercream rosettes, golden pearl accents, and hand-placed white butterflies. The luscious, textured coconut centre is the perfect canvas for custom lettering in sparkling gold — a true showstopper for any milestone or gathering.

products.name: Coconut Daisy Cream Cake
products.description: Pure, radiant elegance — a cloud-white coconut cake encircled by fluted cream rosettes and adorned with cheerful fresh yellow daisies and glistening gold pearl accents. The textured snow-white top and delicate floral wreath give this cake an effortless, garden-party charm that is perfect for any joyful occasion.

products.name: Blooming Butterfly Celebration Cake
products.description: An absolutely breathtaking creation — every inch blanketed in a riot of hand-piped buttercream blooms in soft pinks, purples, blues, and peaches, studded with shimmering gold and coral spheres. Spectacular hand-crafted butterflies take flight across the surface, making this a true work of edible art for life's grandest, most unforgettable celebrations.

products.name: Blueberry Cream Cheesecake
products.description: A silky smooth cheesecake on a golden biscuit base, framed by a scalloped border of hand-piped whipped cream and piled sky-high with an abundant mountain of fresh, glossy blueberries in a rich compote. Scattered with gold leaf and rosemary, it strikes the perfect balance between deeply indulgent and beautifully refined.

products.name: Naked Red Velvet Cake
products.description: Bold and unapologetically beautiful — this rustic naked-style red velvet lets its deep, jewel-red layers speak for themselves, finished with a crown of cream cheese rosettes, fresh strawberries, blueberries, and a bright yellow daisy. The exposed sides reveal a stunning crimson crumb, making every slice as dramatic to cut as it is delicious to eat.

products.name: Rose Garden Birthday Cake
products.description: A breathtaking explosion of hand-piped buttercream roses and blooms in a vibrant ombré of deep red, coral, and blush pink, covering every inch of this magnificent cake. Pearl accents glimmer between the flowers, and the effect is nothing short of wearable art — for birthdays that truly deserve something extraordinary.

products.name: Red Velvet Strawberry Cream Cake
products.description: Stunning red velvet crumbs coat the sides of this showstopper, framing a smooth, cloud-white cream cheese frosting and a generous crown of whole and halved fresh strawberries still wearing their green leaves. The vivid crimson exterior, bright berries, and silky cream create a flavour combination that is as classic as it is irresistible.

products.name: Orange Blossom Fruit Cake
products.description: A showstopping golden orange mirror glaze tops this elegant celebration cake, surrounded by piped cream rosettes and adorned with fresh orange slices, juicy strawberries, and plump blueberries. Wrapped with a luxurious satin bow, it arrives as both a cake and a gift — bright, citrusy, and impossibly beautiful.

products.name: Chocolate Candy Overload Cake
products.description: An outrageously indulgent chocolate ganache cake piled high with whole Oreo cookies, crunchy KitKat pieces, Ferrero Rocher truffles, and fresh blueberries, all dusted with gold pearl accents. Every forkful delivers a different texture and a new hit of rich, deep chocolate. The ultimate cake for those who believe more is always more.

products.name: Safari Animal Birthday Cake
products.description: A rich chocolate drip cake crowned with Ferrero Rocher truffles and chocolate piping, brought to life with a delightful safari scene of lions, giraffes, elephants, and monkeys. Playful, joyful, and guaranteed to spark pure wonder — the perfect centrepiece for any child's birthday celebration. Custom themes available upon request.

products.name: Classic Carrot Cake — 1.5 kg
products.description: A perfectly proportioned carrot cake dressed in smooth, pillowy cream cheese frosting, with an intricately piped rosette crown and a toasted walnut crumb base. The top is artfully garnished with whole pecans, walnut crumbles, dried cranberries, and a sprig of rosemary — warmly spiced, beautifully finished, and deeply satisfying. Serves 8–10.

products.name: Carrot Cake Gift Box — Just For You
products.description: A pristine, cloud-white carrot cake presented in an elegant clear gift box tied with a luxurious satin ribbon. The scalloped cream border, gold leaf centrepiece, gold pearl accents, and delicate rosemary sprigs make this as breathtaking to receive as it is to eat. The ultimate thoughtful gift for any occasion.

products.name: Mini Blueberry Cream Cakes — Set of 4
products.description: Elegant individual loaf cakes nestled in gold-rimmed presentation trays, each crowned with hand-piped cream rosettes, a single plump blueberry, delicate thyme sprigs, and shimmering gold pearl accents. Refined, luxurious, and beautifully portioned — a sophisticated treat for gifting or a curated dessert table.

products.name: Mini Red Velvet Loaf Cakes — Set of 6
products.description: Individual red velvet loaf cakes in gold-rimmed presentation trays, each dusted generously with vivid crimson velvet crumbs and finished with a plump, jewel-red fresh strawberry. Lusciously moist with a tangy cream cheese layer beneath — the perfect individually portioned treat for parties, gifting, or treating yourself.

products.name: Mini Carrot Cakes — Box of 4
products.description: Individually crafted mini carrot cakes in clear presentation trays, each crowned with cream cheese rosettes, a blueberry, dried cranberry, whole pecan, toasted walnut crumble, and a rosemary sprig. Every element of the full carrot cake experience in one beautifully presented, gift-worthy personal portion. Sold as a box of 4.

products.name: Biscoff Lotus Cheesecake
products.description: A deeply indulgent Biscoff cheesecake with a buttery Lotus biscuit crust, a cloud-soft cream cheese layer, and a rich, smooth Biscoff spread topping studded with whole cookies and caramelised crumbles. That unmistakable warm spiced caramel flavour in every single bite — for the Biscoff devotee, there is simply nothing better.

products.name: Lemon Curd Cream Cake
products.description: Smooth, pillowy white cream frosting is crowned with a glossy, jewel-bright lemon curd mirror that practically glows, finished with fresh lemon wheel slices and fragrant thyme sprigs that add an unexpected herbal lift. Bright, zesty, and effortlessly elegant — sunshine, captured in cake form.

products.name: Chocolate Ganache Berry Sharing Cake
products.description: A deeply rich chocolate cake finished in a lustrous dark ganache glaze, pre-portioned into perfect individual slices and presented beautifully as one. Each portion is crowned with a fresh strawberry and ringed with plump blueberries and fragrant thyme — stunning, intensely chocolatey, and effortlessly ready to serve and share.

products.name: Grand Carrot Cake — 2.5 kg
products.description: An impressively tall and generous carrot cake wrapped in pristine cream cheese frosting, with an abundant swirled rosette crown, a lavish scattering of whole pecans, walnut crumbles, dried cranberries, and fresh rosemary, all resting on a toasted nut crumb base. A warmly spiced, beautifully crafted centrepiece built for larger celebrations. Serves 18–22.

products.name: Biscoff Drip Cake
products.description: A spectacular celebration cake with warmly spiced, caramel-flecked frosting and a generous Biscoff spread drip cascading dramatically down the sides. Whole Lotus Biscoff cookies stand upright among lush piped cream swirls, creating an unmistakable, deeply caramelised showpiece. Rich, indulgent, and impossible to ignore.

products.name: Mini Chocolate Hazelnut Cake
products.description: A sleek, individually portioned chocolate cake cloaked in a smooth ganache glaze with a delicate drip finish. Topped with a cracked Ferrero Rocher truffle, fresh strawberries, plump blueberries, and rosemary sprigs — big-cake elegance in a single, perfectly self-contained serving. Rich, indulgent, and beautifully presented.

products.name: Strawberry Cream Cake
products.description: Simple, pure, and quietly stunning — a smooth ivory cream cake with an elegant scalloped border, crowned with three whole, gold-dusted fresh strawberries in the centre. Clean lines and flawless presentation make this an understated yet genuinely luxurious choice for intimate celebrations or as a heartfelt everyday gesture.

products.name: Carrot Cake Cupcakes — Box of 10
products.description: Ten beautifully crafted carrot cake cupcakes in sleek dark liners, each generously swirled with tangy cream cheese frosting and finished with a whole pecan, fresh blueberry, toasted walnut crumbles, dried cranberry, and a rosemary sprig. Every single one made with the same care as a full celebration cake — perfect for events, dessert tables, or gifting.
